warnings: Power Warning on subnet-4-storage: Load at 1362W (97.3% of limit).

warnings: Power Warning on subnet-4-storage: Load at 1362W (97.3% of limit).

warnings: Power Warning on subnet-4-storage: Load at 1362W (97.3% of limit).

results.label: Rack migration: server-2 to droplet-2-tor2
warnings: Power Warning on subnet-4-storage: Load at 1362W (97.3% of limit).

results.label: CPU warning-level stress on server-1 (60%)
warnings: Power Warning on subnet-4-storage: Load at 1362W (97.3% of limit).

results.label: CPU critical breach on server-1 (96%)
violations: Power Envelope Breach on subnet-4-storage: Combined electrical load is 1480W (Limit: 1400.0W).
Compute Overload on server-1: CPU=100.0% MEM=69.6% (Limit: 95.0%).
recommendations: Move heavy workload containers out of subnet-4-storage to balance rack distribution into the alternate subnet.
Scale server-1 workload horizontally — add a sibling compute node under the same ToR switch and redistribute processes.

results.label: Memory critical breach on server-2 (96%)
violations: Power Envelope Breach on subnet-4-storage: Combined electrical load is 1480W (Limit: 1400.0W).
Compute Overload on server-2: CPU=57.4% MEM=100.0% (Limit: 95.0%).
recommendations: Move heavy workload containers out of subnet-4-storage to balance rack distribution into the alternate subnet.
Scale server-2 workload horizontally — add a sibling compute node under the same ToR switch and redistribute processes.

results.label: Power envelope breach — high-draw workload on server-3 (420W)
violations: Compute Overload on server-3: CPU=98.4% MEM=76.5% (Limit: 95.0%).
warnings: Power Warning on subnet-4-storage: Load at 1362W (97.3% of limit).
recommendations: Scale server-3 workload horizontally — add a sibling compute node under the same ToR switch and redistribute processes.

results.label: Near-limit CPU that breaches on projected step 3 (88%)
violations: Power Envelope Breach on subnet-4-storage: Combined electrical load is 1480W (Limit: 1400.0W).
Compute Overload on server-1: CPU=100.0% MEM=58.0% (Limit: 95.0%).
recommendations: Move heavy workload containers out of subnet-4-storage to balance rack distribution into the alternate subnet.
Scale server-1 workload horizontally — add a sibling compute node under the same ToR switch and redistribute processes.

results.label: Network latency warning on spine->router-1 (120ms)
violations: Network SLA Breach on spine-router[eth0] → router-1[eth0]: Latency=151.2ms (SLA Limit: 150.0ms).
warnings: Power Warning on subnet-4-storage: Load at 1362W (97.3% of limit).
recommendations: Inspect FRRouting BGP path on spine-router[eth0] → router-1[eth0] — consider enabling ECMP load-balancing or switching to an alternate spine route.

results.label: Network SLA breach on spine->router-1 (160ms)
violations: Network SLA Breach on spine-router[eth0] → router-1[eth0]: Latency=201.6ms (SLA Limit: 150.0ms).
warnings: Power Warning on subnet-4-storage: Load at 1362W (97.3% of limit).
recommendations: Inspect FRRouting BGP path on spine-router[eth0] → router-1[eth0] — consider enabling ECMP load-balancing or switching to an alternate spine route.

results.label: Packet loss breach on router-2->server-3 (7%)
violations: Packet Loss Breach on router-2[eth1] → server-3[eth0]: 11.20% loss.
warnings: Power Warning on subnet-4-storage: Load at 1362W (97.3% of limit).
recommendations: Check physical / virtual NIC on router-2[eth1] → server-3[eth0] — packet loss indicates a flapping link or MTU mismatch in the Docker bridge network.

results.label: Combined latency + packet loss (200ms, 8%) on spine->router-2
violations: Power Envelope Breach on subnet-4-storage: Combined electrical load is 1480W (Limit: 1400.0W).
Network SLA Breach on spine-router[eth1] → router-2[eth0]: Latency=293.9ms (SLA Limit: 150.0ms).
Packet Loss Breach on spine-router[eth1] → router-2[eth0]: 16.00% loss.
recommendations: Move heavy workload containers out of subnet-4-storage to balance rack distribution into the alternate subnet.
Inspect FRRouting BGP path on spine-router[eth1] → router-2[eth0] — consider enabling ECMP load-balancing or switching to an alternate spine route.
Check physical / virtual NIC on spine-router[eth1] → router-2[eth0] — packet loss indicates a flapping link or MTU mismatch in the Docker bridge network.

results.label: IOPS warning on server-1 (3100 IOPS)
violations: Power Envelope Breach on subnet-4-storage: Combined electrical load is 1480W (Limit: 1400.0W).
Storage IOPS Breach on server-1: 4650 IOPS (Limit: 4000 IOPS).
recommendations: Move heavy workload containers out of subnet-4-storage to balance rack distribution into the alternate subnet.
Attach an additional NVMe volume to server-1 or enable read caching (Redis) to reduce raw disk IOPS pressure.
